facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 2,322 reviews. Camia Resort & Spa keeps showing up at the top for a reason.

Palm-lined grounds, airy rooms, free breakfast included, infinity pool, and an on-site restaurant. All of it on the quieter Ông Lang coast, away from the crowded south.

This is the Phu Quoc that people come back for. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Infinity pool at Camia Resort & Spa, Ông Lang. 4.8 stars across 2,322 reviews. Free breakfast. Quieter side of the island. This one earns every rating.
